summary: P2P Transfer Email Bug Fix VERIFIED. All 19 backend tests passed. Root cause was P2P transfers (via TransferService.p2p_transfer) didn't send emails. Now both Internal and SEPA P2P transfers send confirmation emails with comprehensive status tracking. Admin resend endpoint correctly prevents duplicate sends and returns proper provider IDs.
critical_code_review_comments: Root cause fix verified: TransferService.p2p_transfer now calls _send_transfer_confirmation_email for both internal and SEPA transfers
New email status fields properly implemented: confirmation_email_status (pending/sent/failed), confirmation_email_sent_at, confirmation_email_provider_id, confirmation_email_error
Admin resend endpoint correctly blocks duplicate sends with 400 response and shows provider_id
Structured logging with [TRANSFER EMAIL] tags is properly implemented in both transfer_service.py and email_service.py
Email failures don't break transfers - graceful error handling with email_warning in response
Minor: Pydantic deprecation warnings for class-based config (cosmetic, not breaking)
seed_data_creation: No test data created - tested with existing transfers and code inspection (LIVE BANKING APPLICATION)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2P Transfer Email bug is fixed. TransferService.p2p_transfer now sends confirmation emails for both Internal and SEPA transfers. New email status fields: confirmation_email_status (enum: pending/sent/failed), confirmation_email_sent_at, confirmation_email_provider_id, confirmation_email_error. Admin resend endpoint at POST /api/v1/admin/transfers/{id}/resend-email prevents duplicate sends. Verified with live API calls that transfers have proper email status fields.
features_verified: Backend: P2P transfers (/api/v1/transfers/p2p) now send confirmation emails - VERIFIED (code inspection)
Backend: Regular transfers continue to send confirmation emails - VERIFIED (API test)
Backend: Transfer record includes new email status fields - VERIFIED (API shows confirmation_email_status, sent_at, provider_id, error)
Backend: Admin resend endpoint POST /api/v1/admin/transfers/{id}/resend-email works - VERIFIED (returns 404 for missing, 400 for already sent)
Backend: Admin resend prevents resending if already sent successfully - VERIFIED (returns 'Email already sent successfully. Provider ID: c4719e34-...')
Backend: Email failures logged with error messages and stored in transfer record - VERIFIED (code inspection)
Backend: Structured logging includes [TRANSFER EMAIL] tags - VERIFIED (code inspection)

admin_resend_duplicate_prevention.response_message: Email already sent successfully. Provider ID: c4719e34-7660-4cb8-94e3-11618c2e33f8
